query: Does regular aerobic exercise reduce resting heart rate?
report:
# Does regular aerobic exercise reduce resting heart rate?

Regular aerobic exercise lowers resting heart rate by improving cardiac efficiency [1]. A cohort study reported a mean resting-rate reduction of about 8 beats per minute after twelve weeks of training [2].

corpus.text: Regular aerobic exercise lowers resting heart rate by improving cardiac stroke efficiency.
A cohort study reported a mean resting heart rate reduction of about 8 beats per minute after twelve weeks of aerobic training.

expected_behavior: states the causal direction (exercise -> lower resting heart rate)
every body sentence carries a citation
reports the ~8 bpm figure grounded in the corpus, not invented

sub_questions: Does aerobic exercise reduce resting heart rate?
